SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF NATYHAN HAWTHORNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW HUEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE TO HAVE THIS MATTER HEARD TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAWTHORNE, NATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUEY, MATTHEW $2,951.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,041.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
